description: Tour360 Carbon WD shoes from adidas with a leather upper Mono-tongue construction for a glove-like Fit with lace ups X-STATIC silver filament fibers woven into the lining is antimicrobial, eliminates odor and static, and helps regulate temperature for optimized comfort Embossed branding on the tongue and back AdiTUFF technology for durabiltiy and strength Silver tri-stripe design on the sides Removable FitFOAM insole which provides ever-lasting cushioning, support and comfort CLIMAPROOF technology for moisture management and ventilation THiNTech technology for improved traction and stability TRAXION technology with spike configuration which provides lock-down grip in all directions and even pressure distribution.
